name: Chicken Curry Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Cooked rice, cooled (cooked in chicken broth)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine yogurt, 2 tablespoons curry powder, garlic, salt, and ground red pepper. Mix well.
2. Place chicken in the mixture; stir to coat evenly.
3. Cover and refrigerate for 4 to 6 hours to allow marination.
4. Grill or broil the chicken until cooked through, then cut into strips. Refrigerate the chicken strips.
5. In another bowl, combine cooled rice with the remaining 1 tablespoon curry powder, red pepper, red onion, snow peas, green onions, raisins, and peanuts. Mix well.
6. Cover and refrigerate for one hour.
7. Pour the light Italian dressing over the salad and toss gently to coat evenly.
8. To serve, place chicken strips on top of the salad.
Each serving provides:
463 calories
40.2 g protein
11.2 g fat
50.7 g carbohydrate
4.8 g dietary fiber
78 mg cholesterol
1378 mg sodium
Source: The Many Nationalities of Rice Reprinted with permission from USA Rice Council
